name: Clozd Win-Loss Analysis API
what_it_does: Win-loss analysis platform with REST API — conducting automated and human-led buyer interviews with won and lost prospects, analyzing deal outcomes with AI, delivering competitive insights on why deals are won or lost, and integrating win-loss data with CRM for rep coaching and product strategy.
use_cases: Querying win-loss interview responses and deal outcome analysis via API
Integrating Clozd win-loss data with Salesforce for opportunity-level outcome attribution
Pulling competitive win-rate analysis by competitor for product and sales strategy
Automating win-loss survey delivery when Salesforce opportunities close
Analyzing buyer feedback themes for product roadmap and messaging decisions
not_for: Real-time competitive intelligence monitoring (use Crayon or Klue)
Sales outreach and engagement (use Outreach or Salesloft)
Customer success and NPS surveys (use Medallia or Qualtrics)
best_when: A product marketing or sales operations team wants systematic post-sale buyer interviews to understand why deals are won or lost, with AI analysis and CRM integration for actionable competitive and messaging insights.
avoid_when: You need real-time competitor monitoring, NPS/CSAT surveys, or outbound engagement — Clozd is specifically for post-sale win-loss research.

auth.notes: API key from Clozd account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for interview completion and deal analysis events. Salesforce OAuth required for CRM integration. No OAuth2 for primary API access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Platform + managed interview services; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: Utah-based company (Lehi). Founded 2017. Raised $22M Series B (2022). Backed by Sorenson Capital. Managed services option — Clozd team conducts human-led buyer interviews. Automated survey option for self-service. AI analysis of interview transcripts. Win-loss program strategy consulting. Strong in mid-market to enterprise SaaS.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for interviews, deal analysis, win rates, and competitive insights. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Salesforce CRM required for automated survey triggers. Human-led interviews are async (weeks turnaround). AI analysis pipeline runs after interview completion.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Interview reads fully idempotent. Deal analysis reads idempotent. Win-rate reads idempotent by period. Competitive insights reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Win-loss analysis is inherently async — interviews take days to weeks to complete
Human-led managed interviews require Clozd team involvement — not fully automated
Salesforce OAuth required for CRM-triggered survey automation
Buyer interview consent required — respondents must agree to participate
Small sample size risk — typical programs get 15-40% response rates

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Buyer interview responses are sensitive — competitive intelligence data requires access control. Respondent PII protection required. Salesforce OAuth for CRM access needs least-privilege scoping.
